book.title: Victory Month Prayer Bulletin 2026
book.subtitle: 30-day prayer & fasting · Jan 2 – 31, 2026
book.description: GOFAMINT North America Victory Month Prayer Bulletin. Theme: Season of True Revival & Great Exploits. Daily prayer focus, scripture meditation, and intercession from January 2 to January 31, 2026, plus three weekly family vigils and additional youth, women, men, and general vigil sessions.

entries.focus: Thanksgiving for what God has done and what He will do in 2026 and beyond.
entries.inspirational_message: As we step into this season of revival and great exploits, it is important that we begin rightly with a heart full of thanksgiving. Genuine revival does not start with activity; it begins with a heart that recognizes God's grace. Throughout Scripture, whenever God prepared a people for renewal, increase, and divine exploits, He first called them back to gratitude, humility, and reverence. As GOFAMINT worldwide, we believe this is a season of personal, corporate, and generational revival. We begin these 30 days not with demands, but with deep gratitude. Thanksgiving aligns our hearts with God, clears the spiritual atmosphere, and prepares us for divine exploits beyond human strength.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for GOFAMINT worldwide, for preservation, growth, and continuity by Your grace.
Thank You for every nation, city, and community where You have planted GOFAMINT as a light and witness.
We thank You for revival already stirring in our assemblies, leaders, and members.
Thank You for past victories, answered prayers, and spiritual exploits that remind us You are still at work.
Father, we appreciate You for unity of vision, doctrine, and purpose across GOFAMINT globally.
Father, we thank You for numerous blessings known and unknown because they are all from You.
We thank You for our General Overseer Pastor (Dr.) Elijah Oludele Abina — be with him in all he lays his hand upon, renew his strength day by day.
Father, thank You for working with our International Executive Council members in all their deliberations.
Thank You for our leaders, pastors, evangelists, ministers and workers, who have remained faithful in season and out of season.
Father, thank You for the success of our last year's convention; we know GOFAMINT is a blessing to the nations.
Thank You for making Your people a blessing indeed to the Church and the world at large.
We thank You in advance for greater exploits, supernatural impact, and unusual testimonies in this season of revival.
Father, we thank You for preserving our families by Your mercy and sustaining us by Your grace.
Thank You for peace in our homes, provision for our needs, and protection over our loved ones.
We appreciate You for marriages strengthened, children guided, and generations covered under Your covenant.
Thank You for healing, restoration, and reconciliation already at work in our families.
Lord, we give You thanks for making our homes altars of continuous worship in this season of revival.
Thank You for turning our families into instruments of influence and testimonies of Your faithfulness.
Father, we thank You for the gift of life, salvation, and daily sustenance.
Thank You for strength, health, and preservation from dangers seen and unseen.
Lord, I thank You for this season of revival, reviving my hunger for You and positioning me for great exploits.
Father, we give You thanks in advance for all You will do in these 30 days of prayer and fasting.
Lead more prayer of thanksgiving for God's goodness and love towards us in GOFAMINT, families, and individuals.
entries.special_intercession: Psalms 84:2-8 — Receive strength to pray-through without wavering and weariness throughout the Victory Month.

entries.focus: Overcoming barriers to true revival and great exploits in our lives and church.
entries.inspirational_message: Every genuine move of God in history has begun with a desperate cry from His people: 'Lord, revive us again!' Revival is not a human invention; it is a divine visitation. The greatest need of our Church today is not merely growth in number, structure, or programs, but a fresh outpouring of the Spirit. Between God's desire to revive and the Church's experience of revival lie barriers that must be identified and removed: unconfessed sin, cold love, spiritual lukewarmness, fear and doubt, unforgiveness and division, materialism and carnality, loss of passion for souls, prayerlessness, pride and self-glory, and doctrinal compromise. Until these spiritual blockages are addressed, divine visitation is hindered.
prayer_points: Heavenly Father, we humbly repent from every form of backsliding. Cleanse Your Church from spiritual complacency and revive our passion for You.
Lord, purge Your Church of every hidden sin and secret compromise that has quenched the fire of the Holy Spirit.
O Lord, by the power of Your Spirit, remove and destroy every barrier, seen or unseen, standing in the way of true revival.
Father, let Your signs, wonders, and mighty works follow our willingness and obedience.
Lord, tear down every wall of division, strife, bitterness, and unforgiveness.
Father, deliver us from worldliness, pride, and self-glory.
O Lord, awaken every sleeping leader, worker, and member throughout your Church worldwide.
Father, let the fire of prayer burn anew upon every altar.
Lord, pour upon every leader, worker, and member fresh oil for usefulness, fruitfulness, and lasting kingdom impact.
Father, transform every member, worker, and leader as holy carriers of Your purity, power and purpose.
O Lord, make every assembly a place of divine encounter, revival, and great exploits.
Lord, cause signs and wonders to become consistent expressions of Your presence in all our assemblies worldwide.
Father, begin with me. Revive my heart again. O Lord, make me your agent of revival wherever I go.
Spirit of Truth, expose and uproot every false doctrine and error in all our assemblies worldwide.
Lord, baptize Your Church afresh with genuine love, a forgiving spirit, and supernatural unity.
entries.special_intercession: Lord, ignite true revival in our hearts and keep us burning for You in season and out of season, for Your glory alone. Amen.

entries.focus: Prayers for personal revival: Lord, make me an agent of true revival and great exploits.
entries.inspirational_message: Personal revival is the root of family and Church revival, and it is the seed from which all other revivals grow. True transformation begins in the heart of the believer. When an individual is renewed in the spirit of their mind, in obedience, prayer, and holy living, the fire spreads to the family and overflows into the Church. To be personally revived is to be re-fired, refined, refilled, rightly corrected, connected and re-empowered for the glory of God. Personal revival begins when you stop pointing fingers and weep in repentance over your own coldness, apathy, carnality, and waywardness, and cry out: 'Lord, it is me standing in the need of fresh fire again.'
prayer_points: Father, breathe life into my spirit, awake every dormant part of my heart that has grown cold towards You.
Father, help me that I will not be useful to Satan and his kingdom in any way or form.
O Lord, help me and revive me so that I will not be useless to your kingdom, myself, my family and my generation.
O Lord, deliver me from all the activities of Satan towards making me useful for his evil agenda.
O Lord, revive me in all aspects of my personal life so I can be useful and fruitful all the days of my life.
O Lord, revive and empower me to become a great barrier to Satan and his agenda at all levels.
O Lord, help me to be renewed in prayer, holiness and obedience so that revival fire spreads from me to my family and overflows into the Church.
Lord, cause me to be personally revived so that I don't just survive but shine, serve faithfully, and stand strong every day of my life.
Heavenly Father, deliver me from all human and demonic factors that rob one of genuine personal revival.
Lord, help me and empower me to be useful all the days of my life.
Father, let revival start in me and spread to my family and Church.
Father, increase my hunger and thirst for Your righteousness and presence.
Holy Spirit, convict me of every hidden sin and attitude that grieves You.
Father, help me to surrender my will fully for Yours, trusting that Your plans for me are perfect.
Father, baptize me with a contagious passion that ignites revival in my family, Church and beyond.
Lord Jesus, breathe Your resurrection power into every dying area of my life — my faith, my purpose, my passion.
entries.special_intercession: Father, let personal revival be my passion and portion. Renew my heart by Your Spirit and make me a vessel fully yielded to You, where the works of the enemy have no place.

entries.focus: Prayers for family revival: Lord, usher my family into a season of true revival and great exploits.
entries.inspirational_message: Family revival is the seed of national transformation. Family is the first sacred place God established and the center of transformation. Family revival is when the Holy Spirit restores God's order, love, prayer, purity and unity in the home with Christ as Head. Revival that stays with one man dies with one man; but revival that reaches family becomes a fire from one generation to the other. You can be righteous and still have no revival in your family. Lot was righteous; Eli served as High Priest; Samuel led the nation — yet their families lacked revival fire. The big question is: Is there revival in your family? When the altar at home is cold, the altar in the Church will soon lose its flame.
prayer_points: Lord, have mercy on me and my family in every area of our lives, let your mercy speak for us.
Our great God, show us mercy and revive us in every area of our family life — spiritually, relationally, emotionally and financially.
Lord, purge our family of any sin that is calling for judgment; let your mercy speak over us.
Every Satanic assignment against the peace, joy or destiny of my family, be destroyed by the blood of Jesus.
Heavenly Father, let your fire fall on my household, purify, heal and revive every heart in my family.
Father, break every negative generational pattern in my family line; deliver my family from every evil work and influence.
O Lord, deliver my family from hidden battles and silent tears preventing revival in my family.
Lord, let all my family members encounter you personally and uniquely.
Lord, save every unsaved member of my family and sanctify every unsanctified member.
O Lord, awake every sleeping area of our spiritual life.
O Lord, deliver us from every secret-weakening that kills family revival.
Father, let peace, forgiveness and understanding reign among our family members.
O Lord, let our home be a sanctuary of your peace, love and unity, and not chaos.
Father, make my family a light in the community, use my family to bring hope, healing and the gospel to others.
O Lord, scatter every power fighting against the unity, holiness and joy of our families.
Heavenly Father, silence every strange voice contending with the voice of God in our homes.
Heavenly Father, uproot every seed of worldliness, lukewarmness and compromise in my family.
Father, by your mercy, restore every lost glory and destiny of our family members.
Father, rekindle the fire of revival in my family and let it burn continuously.
entries.special_intercession: Lord, by Your mercy, dry the tears of every family on the verge of collapse. Strengthen the weary, lift the depressed, restore their spiritual passion, and realign their hearts to godly priorities.

entries.focus: Prayer for church-wide revival: Lord, grant a dawn of true revival and great exploits in our church worldwide.
entries.inspirational_message: The greatest issue concerning revival in our Church is not satanic, nor God — it is we, the people. The big issue is the spiritual condition of leaders, workers, and members. Many seek power without purity, position without brokenness, fruit without faithfulness. Before revival can be experienced, the altar must be repaired. True revival begins when the Church stops entertaining and starts repenting — when the Word replaces religious discussion, prayer replaces program, holiness replaces noise, and love for souls replaces love for status. Revival is not a program; it is a divine visitation. When revival breaks forth, the weak become warriors, the fearful become flames, and the ordinary become vessels of extraordinary exploits.
prayer_points: Lord, forgive us for every sin that is recorded against us, quenching your fire in our Church.
Lord, pour out on us a new passion for holiness, truth and faithfulness to You.
Father, let every pulpit in our Church burn again with uncompromising fire.
Gracious Father, let every department, ministry, unit and venture experience the flame of revival.
Father, pour out a new passion for holiness and truth among leaders and restore divine hunger among workers.
God, keep me very useful and fruitful in your service.
Father, don't let me become ineffective in the Church, weak in my family or powerless in any sphere.
Father, empower us and let our children and youths be agents of revival.
Holy Spirit, empower me to do and sustain exploits, not just achieve them.
Heavenly Father, protect my home, ministry and Church from decay.
Lord, let the power of purity silence the noise of hypocrisy in my Church.
Father, heal wounded ministers and restore fallen soldiers among us worldwide.
Father, let this revival produce reformation, righteousness and transformation in our midst.
Lord, let signs and wonders follow Your word in every assembly of this Church.
Lord, revive every cold heart and restore our genuine passion and love for You.
Father, let holiness return to our pulpits and passion to our pews.
Spirit of God, take over the lives of our Choristers, Ushers, Teachers and Intercessors.
Father, ignite true revival in our Churches and personal lives beyond pretense.
Heavenly Father, raise men and women of prayer, power and purity in every local assembly.
Lord, terminate every strange fire of human scheme against our pulpits.
Father, raise end-time revivalists, reformers and Missionaries from among us.
entries.special_intercession: Father, pour upon us fresh oil from heaven to ignite renewal and sustain genuine revival in every aspect of our Church worldwide.

entries.focus: Overcoming unforgiveness in our lives, families and church.
entries.inspirational_message: Unforgiveness is a great barrier to the move of God. It is holding a fire that burns only you. Many today pray for fresh fire, but their hearts are filled with offense. Forgiveness is the missing key to personal harmony, family peace and Church revival. Without forgiveness, no revival can stand. Unforgiveness blocks our prayers, drains spiritual power, turns passion to coldness, and makes us tools of the enemy in the body of Christ. Forgiveness is the fuel of revival — it opens the heavens, invites divine visitation, heals wounds, restores presence, and multiplies exploits in ministry.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You because through the blood of Jesus we have redemption and the forgiveness of our sins.
O Lord, heal Your Church as those You have forgiven. Shape us into a forgiving people.
Father, empower us to overcome the stronghold of unforgiveness that drains spiritual life from Your Church.
O Lord, breathe fresh revival through hearts that forgive. Let Your mercy reign among us.
Father, revive our hearts by Your mercy, and let the spirit of forgiveness flow freely throughout your Church.
Heavenly Father, restore the spirit of unity in our Church, and break every chain of offense.
O Lord, by Your Spirit, reveal and heal every hidden root of bitterness in my heart and within my family.
Gracious Father, heal broken friendships and restore marriages throughout your Church worldwide.
Father, cleanse us from every form of pride, anger, and resentment operating in our lives.
Lord, immerse us in compassion and ignite again the fire of love across our church.
Father, as You forgive me, help me to forgive others, and break every barrier created by offense.
Holy Spirit, heal every hidden wound within me, and purge my heart from malice and bitterness.
Father, neutralize every force that uses offense to hinder revival and Church growth.
Lord, restore unity in every assembly and strengthen harmony among all cadres of leadership.
O Lord, heal wounded leaders and restore to them the joy, peace, and passion of service.
Father, remove every spirit of strife and division from our families and from this Church.
Heavenly Father, let forgiveness open afresh the gate of miracles and kingdom exploits.
entries.special_intercession: O Lord, baptize us with uncommon grace to forgive fully and walk in love, both in our homes and in every GOFAMINT assembly worldwide.

entries.focus: Lord, rekindle the fire of revival and great exploits in all departments, ministries, units and ventures in GOFAMINT.
entries.inspirational_message: All Departments, Ministries, Units and Ventures in GOFAMINT are expected to be vibrant, effective and efficient. They are the avenues through which our service to God is expressed. When fire falls, fear disappears and faith arises. Cowards become carriers of power. Ordinary departments become extraordinary channels of miracles. Ministries overflow with results that glorify God. We need the power as of old, the love as of old, the commitment as of old. We are destined for revival and great exploits.
prayer_points: Heavenly Father, we thank You for all the departments, ministries, units, and ventures within GOFAMINT.
Father, we thank You for the leaders and heads of these departments, ministries, units, and ventures.
Lord, we surround every department, ministry, unit, and venture in GOFAMINT with the wall of Your power.
O Lord, protect all workers, ministers, and staff serving in these departments from every form of attack.
Heavenly Father, empower every department to function effectively and efficiently for kingdom impact.
Lord, we pray that all who labor faithfully across these departments will not lose their reward.
Father, let the divine purpose for which every department was established be fully accomplished.
Father, let the Spirit of holiness rest mightily upon every department, ministry, unit, and venture within GOFAMINT.
Lord, cause great exploits to break forth from every department, ministry, unit, and venture, to Your glory.
Father, ignite every cold, discouraged, distracted or weary heart within our departments, and set them ablaze again with passion for You.
Lord, transform every department, ministry, unit, and venture into a lighthouse of revival and a center of spiritual reawakening.
We pray prophetically that every leader and head of department shall receive clear vision, divine burden, wisdom, and courage for effective leadership.
entries.special_intercession: Father, release fresh passion upon every leader, worker, and member to walk worthy of our calling across all departments, units, and ministries of the Church, to the glory of Your name.

entries.focus: Prayers for our leaders: Lord, empower our leaders at all levels to become effective agents of transformational revival and Spirit-birthed exploits.
entries.inspirational_message: Every lasting revival in Scripture and Church history began with leaders who caught the fire of God. When leaders are weak, prayerless and carnal, the work of God stagnates. But when leaders are Spirit-empowered and full of faith, revival flows from them like a river. Today, we don't just need trained leaders — we need transformed leaders, carriers of Holy Ghost fire with conviction, compassion and courage. When leaders are blazing, followers catch the flame. When leaders lose the fire, the Church settles for form without power. God's pattern has never changed: He anoints a man and then moves a generation.
prayer_points: Heavenly Father, we thank You for the leaders at every level of GOFAMINT operations.
Lord, we thank You for the sustaining grace that has preserved our leaders in their various spheres.
Father, we repent of every leadership weakness, misunderstanding, or disunity that has hindered Your power.
Thank You, Lord, for the progress, achievements, and positive impact our leaders have recorded.
O Lord, uproot every form of carnality, rivalry, and unhealthy competition that quenches the fire of revival.
Heavenly Father, by Your mercy, equip our leaders with fresh grace, inner strength, spiritual zeal, and divine wisdom.
Lord, endue our leaders with power from above so they may serve faithfully without falling, erring, or growing weary.
Father, energize our leaders to function as agents of regeneration and transformation across GOFAMINT.
O Lord, revive Your Church, and let the labor of our leaders yield abundant fruit and multiplied impact.
Heavenly Father, strengthen and encourage our leaders to walk and work as carriers of revival.
Lord, grant our leaders sound knowledge, discernment, and understanding for Your glory.
Father, saturate the hearts of our leaders with heaven-inspired commitment that produces Spirit-birthed exploits.
Lord, cause our leaders to witness Holy Spirit-inspired breakthroughs in their respective spheres.
Heavenly Father, breathe upon the labors of our leaders and make them instruments of transformation.
O Lord, grant our leaders the anointing, wisdom, and experience required to function dynamically.
Father, raise a new generation of leaders who are passionate in spirit, pure in heart, and purposeful in calling.
Lord, release upon our leaders the anointing of holy boldness to confront evil and uphold righteousness.
Heavenly Father, crown our leaders with favor, sound health, and divine backing for great exploits.
Lord, transform our leaders into vessels who see through Your eyes and serve through Your love.
entries.special_intercession: Father, make our leaders carriers of Your revelation and grace, empowering every member of our Church to remain focused and serve You with undivided loyalty, to the glory of Your name.

entries.focus: Revival in our worship service: Lord, breathe on all our Sunday and midweek services.
entries.inspirational_message: The Church is the called-out people of God who gather for heartfelt worship, mutual fellowship and Holy-Spirit-induced service. Yet in many places, what should be a divine encounter has become a routine gathering. When the Holy Ghost breathes upon a service, souls are convicted — not entertained, hearts are transformed not impressed. The sick are healed, sinners are saved, revelation flows from the Word, heaven's presence becomes tangible. When God breathes, the ordinary becomes supernatural. Our services must not remain normal meetings — they must become holy furnaces of transformation, centers of fire, healing, salvation and revelation.
prayer_points: Heavenly Father, we thank You for Your faithful dealings with GOFAMINT from inception until now.
Lord, we thank You for Your manifold grace upon every minister and member of GOFAMINT worldwide.
Father, we appreciate You for all our programs, Sunday worship services, and midweek gatherings.
Lord, we repent of every form of routine, lifeless worship, and powerless gathering.
O Lord, breathe afresh upon our Sunday services and turn them into channels of divine encounter.
Heavenly Father, cause all our Sunday services to become centers of true transformation.
Father, let every Sunday service across GOFAMINT become a platform for genuine revival and extraordinary miracles.
O Lord, let every participant in our services continually experience testimonies and tangible blessings.
Heavenly Father, make our Sunday and midweek services spiritually attractive and powerful.
Lord, anoint all our ministers with grace for thorough preparation and Spirit-led delivery of Your Word.
Father, ignite in our members a deep hunger and thirst for You, for holiness, and for spiritual maturity.
O Lord, increase our love for You and express it through faithfulness, punctuality, and active participation.
Father, visit our midweek services with fresh revelation and prophetic fire.
Holy Spirit, preside over every service — directing every moment, guiding every word.
Father, replace routine with revival and tradition with genuine transformation.
Lord, release the power of conviction upon every gathering, that sinners may encounter Christ.
Father, anoint our ushers, choir, intercessors, teachers, and all service teams with fresh fire.
O Lord, remove every trace of spiritual dryness from our assemblies and fill us with fresh oil from heaven.
declarations: I shall henceforth be a beneficiary of divine exploits.
Lord, usher GOFAMINT into a new season of true exploits, beginning with me.
Father, release a revival upon GOFAMINT, starting with me and my household.
Lord, help me to experience our Sunday services and midweek programs as channels of true revival.
Father, baptize our leaders at all levels with wisdom, knowledge, and fresh anointing.
Lord, grant our leaders grace, strength, and spiritual dynamism for excellent performance.
entries.special_intercession: Father, unite us in worship and in fellowship, and let a season of refreshing from Your presence flow freely and unhindered among us, in Jesus' name.

entries.focus: Gospel City Partnership Seed Drive.
entries.scripture_text: Ezra 6:14; Deuteronomy 18:4; Deuteronomy 26:11; Luke 5:1-11; Exodus 25:1-9; 36:2-7; 1 Kings 17:8-15; Zechariah 1:17
entries.inspirational_message: The acquisition of our Gospel City property was made possible solely by the grace of Almighty God in 2022. GOFAMINT NA stands as the full owner of this $2,061,906.25 property — completely debt-free — through the collective sacrifice of our partners. The Lord led the leadership to invite the entire family into partnership through the Gospel Partnership Seed. The 2025/2026 Gospel City Partnership Seed Drive aims to raise $1 million between July 2025 and July 2026. By God's grace, we have so far realized $276,040 (~38%) from 195 partners. Truly, we are walking in our Season of Supernatural Prosperity.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You because You are the Giver of all things, and out of Your boundless generosity, You have freely given us all things to enjoy.
Father, we thank You for every member of GOFAMINT NA who has identified with the Gospel City vision.
O Lord, grant us the grace of obedience to Your commandments.
Father, bless all Your children who have remained faithful in tithes and the Gospel City Partnership Seed.
O Lord, as I participate faithfully, activate Your covenant over my life and order my steps to destiny helpers.
Father, arise in Your power and strength. Raise covenant helpers for me and enlarge my coast.
Every connection that ties me to destiny killers — catch fire and be burnt to ashes by the Holy Spirit.
Father, baptize us with a higher grace of sacrificial giving this year.
Father, let everyone who has redeemed their pledges begin to experience divine conquests and unstoppable prosperity.
Father, we declare that participation in the Gospel City Partnership Seed shall exceed previous years.
Father, use the Gospel City Partnership Seed to elevate us into higher dimensions of cheerful, sacrificial, generous giving.
Because we are committed to Your project, banish poverty and lack from our lives.
Father, we receive the grace of sacrificial giving as exemplified by the Macedonian church and Philippi.
Bless us richly with good health, great wealth, and global influence.
Father, bless the Chairman of the Gospel City Maintenance and Building Committee, Elder Philip Olaomi, and all members.
Father, bountifully compensate every member of the GCBMC for the time, energy, and resources they have invested.
declarations: Every scattering horn working against our prosperity is burnt and scattered by the fire of the Holy Ghost.
God will deploy money, favor, promotion, divine connections, and angelic assistance to advance our destinies.
As the Lord raised King Ahasuerus for Mordecai, so shall the Lord raise covenant helpers for our lifting this year.
The Lord will baptize us afresh with the grace of giving that unlocks supernatural prosperity.
God will impress our matters upon the hearts of those ordained to help us.
This year, we shall not borrow, but we shall lend to nations.
We receive divine ideas, strategies, and innovations that will catapult us into new realms of greatness.

entries.focus: Divine intervention for our matured singles and waiting couples.
entries.inspirational_message: Today, a sacred and weighty responsibility rests upon us as the household of faith. We are called to carry, not casually but compassionately, the burdens of our brethren — matured single brothers and sisters who desire marriage, and married couples who are trusting God for the fruit of the womb. These are not statistics; they are lives. Though some may smile in public worship, only God knows the silent tears shed in private moments. Scripture instructs: 'Rejoice with those who rejoice, and weep with those who weep.' These brethren must not weep alone.
prayer_points: Father, we repent for every time we have been insensitive to the silent struggles of our brethren who desire marriage and children.
Today, we stand in the gap on behalf of our brethren. Look upon us in mercy and turn their sorrow into joy.
We choose to weep with those who weep and mourn with those who mourn. Let heaven respond to our united cry.
Lord, we carry the pain of our brethren upon our hearts. Heal every abnormality, every reproach, and every hidden wound.
Their pain is our pain; their delay is our burden. Great Physician, bring wholeness and restoration.
Just as You visited the wedding at Cana, Lord Jesus, step into our midst and intervene in every delayed marital and fruitfulness situation.
Father, by Your mighty power, open the doors of goodness, favor, and divine connection.
Father, pour new wine into the lives of our matured singles. Replace weariness with hope.
Turn every season of mourning into celebration. Let the days of wedding bells and naming ceremonies arise among us.
We declare that weeping may have endured through the night, but let the morning of joy break forth now.
Today we invite the Father, the Son, the Holy Spirit, and the hosts of heaven into the lives of our brethren for complete and undeniable miracles.
We prophesy that God-ordained spouses for our waiting sisters and brothers will manifest, locate, and align with them divinely.
We declare the release of God-ordained children into the wombs of all waiting mothers in GOFAMINT.
Lord, give clear direction and discernment to every brother and sister concerning the steps they must take toward their miracles.
Father, grant them hearing ears and obedient hearts to do whatever You command.
It is not good for man or woman to be alone. Lord, give each one their bone of bones and flesh of flesh.
Children are Your heritage. Lord, release Your heritage into every waiting family.
We invoke the miracle-working anointing upon our General Overseer, Pastor (Dr.) Elijah Oladele Abina, upon all GOFAMINT assemblies.
declarations: No more silent tears.
No more reproach.
Only testimonies and celebrations in our lives.
Let there be more than enough in every home.
Let our tabernacles be filled with the voice of rejoicing and salvation.
entries.special_intercession: Father, break every barrier to conjugal bliss in our churches. Establish honorable marriages and keep the marriage bed undefiled.

entries.focus: Total protection, provision and preservation for all GOFAMINT members worldwide in 2026 and beyond.
entries.inspirational_message: Being in Christ carries immeasurable covenant privileges. As members of the GOFAMINT family, we carry an enduring spiritual legacy — a heritage of divine covering and supernatural supply. There is no justification for fear, anxiety, sadness, or discouragement to dominate our lives. These are weapons of the enemy designed to weaken believers. Fear is Satan's strategy to defeat believers before the battle even begins. Anxiety drains strength. Sadness steals joy. Discouragement robs inner strength. When faith, prayer, joy, and courage operate together, they produce a sound mind that places us in advantageous position to rule and reign in life.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You because You have not given us the spirit of fear, but of power, love, and a sound mind.
By the authority in the name of Jesus, we cast out the spirits of fear, anxiety, sadness, and discouragement.
We release the blood of Jesus to destroy every negative force around our lives, families, and GOFAMINT assemblies.
We reject and renounce every spirit of ill-luck, failure, disappointment, disaster, and frustration.
We receive the sound mind produced by faith, prayer, and joy.
We receive the signs and marks of conquerors and overcomers to rule and dominate in life.
We reject and eject every poverty mentality from the hearts of GOFAMINT members worldwide.
We decree a divine transition from dry places of lack to well-watered gardens of more than enough.
We declare forward movement for every GOFAMINT member from 'not enough' to 'more than enough.'
Let every closed door of opportunity open for faithful GOFAMINT members.
Let divine supply meet every need of GOFAMINT members.
Father, as the mountains surround Jerusalem, let your divine presence and protection surround GOFAMINT members worldwide.
Every evil operation plotted in secret against GOFAMINT members is cancelled and destroyed.
We release the garment of divine immunity upon all GOFAMINT members against every satanic attack.
We decree zero evil occurrence and zero evil experience for all GOFAMINT members.
Father, do something good and great as divine gifts for all and sundry across GOFAMINT.
Release divine solutions to every challenge faced by GOFAMINT members.
Let signs and wonders define GOFAMINT families and assemblies.
Let the death-swallowing power of God fill our lives, businesses, ministries, and endeavors.
We decree progress, growth, and increase in all our lives and assemblies.
Let us rejoice in the presence of God and cast away every garment of sorrow.

hymn.title: Conquerors and Overcomers Now Are We
verses:
Conquerors and overcomers now are we,
Thro' the precious blood of Christ we've victory,
If the Lord be for us, we can never fail;
Nothing 'gainst his mighty pow'r can e'er prevail.

In the name of Israel's God we'll onward press,
Overcoming sin and all unrighteousness;
Not to us, but unto him the praise shall be,
For salvation and for blood-bought victory.

Unto him that overcometh shall be giv'n
Here to eat of hidden manna sent from heav'n;
Over yonder he the victor's palm shall bear,
And a robe of white, and golden crown shall wear.
hymn.chorus:
Conquerors are we, thro' the blood, thro' the blood;
God will give us victory, thro' the blood, thro' the blood,
Thro' the Lamb for sinners slain,
Yet who lives and reigns again,
More than conquerors are we,
More than conquerors are we.

entries.special_intercession: Father, instill divine confidence in all our undertakings, release the Spirit of boldness, faith, and sound mind upon all GOFAMINT members, and empower us to advance fearlessly, flourish greatly, and fulfill destiny.

entries.focus: Miraculous intervention in difficult times in our mission worldwide.
entries.inspirational_message: One of the common realities of human existence is difficulty. Yet every challenge has a divine antidote. To all passing through storms, Jesus speaks: 'Be of good cheer; it is I; be not afraid.' The presence of problems does not signal defeat — it presents an opportunity for divine intervention. Scripture reveals three sources of challenges: sin of commission (disobedience), sin of omission (neglecting God's assignment), and satanic attacks. Jonah's experience teaches us that prayer is the master key — from the depths of despair, he cried unto the Lord, and heaven responded.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You because Your plans for our lives are plans of peace, hope, and a glorious future.
Lord Jesus, we thank You because You have overcome the world; therefore, every battle confronting us is already defeated.
With a contrite heart, we confess and forsake every sin of commission and omission. Cleanse us by the blood of Jesus.
Father, let mercy prevail over judgment in our lives. Silence every accusation of the enemy through the blood of Jesus.
We declare that Satan will no longer gain access to our lives through disobedience or neglect.
As Jonah cried from the depths, we cry unto You today, Lord. Arise and intervene in every unresolved challenge.
Remove every instrument of sorrow, pain, and affliction fashioned against us, and replace them with Your joy and peace.
Release heaven's ordained solution to every challenge confronting my life.
Let the anointing of the Holy Spirit break every yoke and terminate long-standing problems.
Remove the garment of hardship and clothe us with freedom, joy, and glory.
Every satanic agent assigned to hold us in bondage, be displaced now by the power of God.
We reject sickness and receive health; we reject failure and receive success; we reject stagnation and receive progress.
By divine power, transport us from places of discomfort to our God-ordained rest and fulfillment.
We decree the release of every GOFAMINT member under any form of oppression worldwide.
We command supernatural release for any member under physical, emotional, or spiritual imprisonment.
We raise the standard of the Holy Spirit against every enemy rising like a flood against GOFAMINT.
We bind and cast out the spirits of difficulty, disfavor, disappointment, and failure from all affected GOFAMINT members.
Father, grant us the grace of genuine repentance and total obedience.
Father, restore GOFAMINT fully to the heartbeat of evangelism.
Rekindle fresh passion and holy urgency for soul-winning in all our ministers and leaders.
Make every member of GOFAMINT a bold, fruitful, and consistent soul-winner for Christ.
declarations: Problems will not silence us.
Obedience will reposition us.
Prayer will deliver us.
The gospel will advance significantly through us.
entries.special_intercession: Father, deliver us from selective obedience. Align our hearts fully with Your will. Make us Your peculiar treasure. Make us obedient, fruitful, and pleasing unto You. Let GOFAMINT walk in divine order, spiritual authority, and kingdom impact.

entries.focus: Solving our problems and meeting all our needs.
entries.inspirational_message: Every human being instinctively desires goodness, peace, progress, fulfillment, and abundance. Yet the very good things God designed for our lives often appear delayed or resisted. Jesus revealed: 'An enemy has done this.' But three powerful truths work in our favor: God's purpose for us is good, the righteous desires of our hearts are approved by God, and Christ's primary mission was to destroy the works of the enemy. Through Christ's finished work, the curse has been broken. What remains is faith-filled appropriation. Prayer is our spiritual rod — it confronts satanic resistance, dismantles strongholds, and opens the heavens.
prayer_points: We declare that we are conquerors and overcomers through Christ Jesus!
Father, we thank You for Your loving-kindness and Your eternal program of goodness for our lives.
Thank You, Lord, for the gift of life and for preserving us to this day.
Thank You for the salvation of our souls through the death and resurrection of our Lord Jesus Christ.
By faith in the finished work of Christ, we receive every package of goodness You have prepared for us.
We come under the Cross of Calvary and declare that Jesus Christ is Lord over our lives, families, and destinies.
Every power resisting God's good plan for our lives, we command you to bow and be removed.
We declare we are of God, and no aspect of our lives shall yield to satanic operations.
We decree divine healing over our land, families, and all GOFAMINT assemblies.
We expose and uproot every hidden work of sin and compromise in our midst.
We decree Operation 'No Room for Satan' in GOFAMINT.
Holy Spirit, thoroughly purge Your floor — cleanse, refine, and dwell powerfully among us.
Empower each one of us to know You and the power of Your resurrection, deeply, and to do exploits.
Give every one of us an open door into our land of destiny to fulfill divine purpose.
Bless all faithful laborers in GOFAMINT and usher them into their season of harvest.
Let showers of blessing fall upon GOFAMINT, cause us to blossom and bear fruit in Your house.
Grant our youths divine connections and position them as kingdom ambassadors in strategic places.
Father, release supernatural breakthroughs in our soul-winning and church expansion efforts.
Make GOFAMINT a house of abundant spiritual nourishment and tangible blessings to feed the hungry world.
Father, restore genuine love, unity, and godly relationships in our families, assemblies, and leadership.
declarations: No lack.
No defeat.
No unanswered prayers.
Only glory, provision, and triumph.
Our season of more than enough is here. Hallelujah!
entries.special_intercession: Father, meet all our needs according to Your riches in glory by Christ Jesus. Arise and contend with every adversary standing against Your people. Let GOFAMINT walk in victory, abundance, peace, and divine rest.

entries.focus: Overcoming destiny-limiting vices of laziness, ignorance, mediocrity, and procrastination.
entries.scripture_text: Proverbs 6:6-11; Ecclesiastes 10:18; Romans 12:11; Hosea 4:6; Proverbs 4:7; Daniel 6:3; Ecclesiastes 11:4
entries.inspirational_message: Destiny is God's eternal blueprint for every individual life. Yet, many destinies are delayed, diminished, or even aborted, not primarily by demons, but by personal vices that function as destiny-killers. Laziness suffocates potential. Ignorance is not an excuse — knowledge is power. Mediocrity opposes excellence — our God is a God of excellence. Procrastination delays destiny — delayed obedience is still disobedience. Daniel stood out because 'an excellent spirit was in him.' When diligence replaces laziness, wisdom replaces ignorance, excellence replaces mediocrity, and discipline replaces procrastination, destiny is preserved and fulfilled.
prayer_points: Father, thank You for the gift of destiny and divine purpose You have deposited in my life.
Lord, I surrender every area of weakness, inconsistency, and compromise — let Your strength be perfected in me.
Father, deliver me from every spirit of laziness, slothfulness, and complacency hindering my progress.
Every power assigned to make me waste time, energy, and opportunity, be destroyed in Jesus' name.
O Lord, baptize me afresh with the spirit of diligence, discipline, and excellence.
Every chain of ignorance limiting my growth, break now by fire.
Every satanic agenda to frustrate my potential, scatter now and completely.
Father, let the anointing for hard work, consistency, and fruitful labor rest upon my life.
Lord, open my eyes to truths that will liberate me from every form of bondage.
Father, let the Spirit of revelation, insight, and wisdom abide with me continually.
Deliver me, O Lord, from wrong information, deception, and mental blindness.
Father, uproot every spirit of average performance, impart unto me an excellent spirit like Daniel.
Let my life reflect divine excellence, kingdom quality, and godly distinction in all I do.
Lord, make me a standard of excellence and a model of godly success in my generation.
Father, deliver me from the traps of delay, indecision, and procrastination.
Lord, grant me grace to act promptly on divine instructions and kingdom opportunities.
O Lord, give me the grace to start what I must start and finish what I begin.
Father, awaken every dormant gift, calling, and potential You placed within me.
Let the fire of purpose, passion, and spiritual urgency burn continually in my heart.
Father, make me a faithful steward of time, talent, and resources.
By Your Spirit, move me from excuses to execution, from potential to performance.
I declare that laziness shall not rule over me — I am diligent, disciplined, and productive.
I decree that ignorance shall not destroy me — I walk in divine knowledge, wisdom, and revelation.
declarations: Destiny shall not be aborted.
Purpose shall not be delayed.
God shall be glorified through our lives.
entries.special_intercession: Father, deliver us as a people from laziness, complacency, and the demon of procrastination. Impart unto us the grace for diligence, urgency, excellence, and faithful stewardship. Position us to fulfill destiny, glorify Your name, and impact our generation.

entries.focus: Home Mission: Great breakthrough, divine speed, all-round provision and angelic protection for our missionaries and mission field.
entries.scripture_text: Isaiah 58:11; Psalm 107:9; Song of Solomon 4:15; Psalm 91:3-6
entries.inspirational_message: Nigeria remains our primary mission field — a land with vast populations still unreached. Though churches abound, many communities remain in spiritual darkness. The gospel will not reach these fields unless missionaries are sent. Satan is making frantic efforts to barricade people from the truth through fear, violence, poverty, insecurity, and persecution. Missionary work is not convenient; it is costly. Yet our missionaries press on, driven by love for souls and obedience to the Great Commission. The DNA of missions runs through our history. To neglect missions is to disconnect from our roots. While they go, we must stand behind them in prayer.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for Your faithfulness over all our missionaries through the years.
Lord, we appreciate You for the Missions Department, its leadership, staff, and members.
Thank You, Father, for sustaining the Missions School from its inception.
We pray that You will continue to honor Your covenant of protection and peace over every missionary.
Father, grant our missionaries uncommon favor with community leaders and government authorities.
Lord, grant them divine speed and grace to penetrate difficult and resistant mission fields.
Heavenly Father, provide regularly and abundantly for our missionaries.
Grant our missionaries undeniable testimonies of kingdom expansion and transformed lives.
Father, for those serving in remote and health-challenging environments, grant them divine immunity.
Father, in the face of insecurity, kidnapping, and violence in Nigeria, let Your shadow of protection rest upon all our missionaries.
Lord, where missionaries lack adequate provision, raise covenant helpers and faithful partners.
Father, grant our missionaries clear guidance and strategic locations for the gospel.
We declare no weapon fashioned against any of our missionaries shall prosper.
Lord, strengthen and bless all staff members of the Missions School.
Father, grant Pastor Femi Fabiyi divine protection, wisdom, and supernatural help as he directs the Missions School.
Lord, release fresh insight, grace, and strategic revelation upon Pastor Paul Edu, Head of Missions Department.
declarations: The gospel shall advance.
Missionaries shall be preserved.
Souls shall be saved.
God shall be glorified.
entries.special_intercession: Father, raise up lovers of missions and helpers of missionaries among our brethren. Stir hearts to pray, to give, to go, and to support. Let no missionary labor alone or fall by the wayside. May Nigeria witness a fresh wave of gospel light, revival, and transformation through our missionaries.

entries.focus: Operation 2030: Great mission of aggressive soul winning, church planting and Kingdom advancement.
entries.inspirational_message: GOFAMINT exists for one central purpose: to preach the gospel and bring men and women into the fellowship of His Church. Our General Overseer leads by example. Operation 2030 was birthed as a strategic vision to raise GOFAMINT branches in Nigeria to over 2,000 by 2030. In 2024, National Evangelists were deployed to the North-East. In 2025, focus shifted to South-South and South-East with a new Missionary Region in Abakaliki. The Vision 2030 train is moving with speed — but every fast-moving divine vision must be powered by prayer.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for choosing GOFAMINT as one of Your vessels for the continuity of the gospel.
Thank You, Lord, for standing by this Mission for almost seventy years.
We appreciate You for the chosen vessels who have faithfully carried this divine assignment.
Father, we thank You for fresh vision and revelation on soul-winning given through Pastor (Dr.) Elijah Oludele Abina.
We bless Your name for Operation Identification, Operation Open Door, and now Operation 2030.
Lord, let Operation 2030 continue to yield abundant harvests of souls for Your glory.
We terminate every power from the pit of hell resisting the advancement of Operation 2030.
We decree that every church planted through Operation 2030 will continue to grow and multiply.
We decree that the zeal of all Evangelists and Pastors deployed for Operation 2030 shall not diminish.
Father, let the success of Operation 2030 continually bring joy to Your servant, Pastor Abina.
Lord, grant Pastor Oludimila Olaoluwa grace to run with the vision of Operation 2030.
Gracious Father, let Operation 2030 continue to subdue territories and establish Your kingdom.
We declare there shall be no lack of financial, human, or material resources to accomplish this vision.
Father, let Operation 2030 become an instrument of reconciliation in hostile and divided communities.
O Lord, re-orient our hearts as a Mission — let soul-winning become our lifestyle and priority.
Bring men and women from East, West, North, and South into GOFAMINT for salvation.
Father, let Your final command — to take the gospel to every creature — become our supreme passion.
Let Operation 2030 birth a renewed GOFAMINT, fully aligned and empowered to accomplish Your divine mandate.
declarations: The vision 2030 shall not fail.
The laborers shall not faint.
The harvest shall be great.
Christ shall be glorified.
entries.special_intercession: Father, place the burden of Operation 2030 deeply upon our hearts. Help us to intercede consistently and sacrificially for this vision. Let no prayer fall to the ground, no effort be wasted, and no soul be lost. May Operation 2030 fulfill its purpose and bring glory to Your name.

entries.focus: Oh Lord, let Africa be harvested for You.
entries.inspirational_message: Africa is deeply afflicted — not only by physical diseases, but by spiritual and moral crises: idolatry, immorality, occultism, poverty, injustice, corruption, and leadership failures. These cannot be healed by social reforms alone — they require the wholesome gospel of Jesus Christ. The continent is ripe for harvest. Multitudes receive the Word with joy, but many drift back due to economic pressure, lack of discipleship, and absence of care. Africa needs Word, Warfare, and Welfare. Not everyone is called to go, but everyone can participate. We need Goers (those sent), Givers (who resource the work), and Groaners (intercessors who travail in prayer).
prayer_points: Father, we thank you for our past evangelistic and soul-winning efforts in Africa.
Father, we ask for a greater move of your Spirit to bring spiritual reform and revival to Africa.
Father, let the church be bold and courageous in sharing Jesus, even in the face of persecution.
Father, let your mighty power be tangibly evident in the lives of our ministers and brethren.
Africa, your time of salvation has come! Every power of darkness resisting the gospel is overthrown.
Every principality blinding Africa to the light of Christ, be uprooted and destroyed.
Father, arise and restore peace, godly fear, and obedience to spiritual authority in GOFAMINT Benin Republic.
Lord, raise men and women across Africa whose hearts are committed to You financially.
Bless all who faithfully support African Missions spiritually, physically, and financially.
We pray for increased grace upon Ghana, Benin Republic, Liberia, Togo, and Kenya — let them grow stronger.
Father, release supernatural help upon Cameroon, Sierra Leone, Côte d'Ivoire, South Africa, Botswana, Egypt, Uganda, Burkina Faso.
We decree that the AGO African Missions, Pastor (Dr.) Sam Okomolehin, and his family shall receive marvelous help.
Father, raise partners within and outside GOFAMINT to support African Missions financially this year.
Release upon all African Missions members fresh zeal, hunger for soul-winning, and love for holiness.
We decree that all National Overseers across Africa shall receive supernatural help to advance the gospel.
Father, terminate the spirit of poverty across African Missions fields and supply every need.
We thank You, Lord, because these prayers are answered and Africa shall yet rejoice in salvation.
declarations: The harvest of Africa shall not waste.
Faithful and committed laborers shall arise.
Africa shall be saved.
Christ shall be glorified.
entries.special_intercession: Lord of Harvest, send forth laborers into the harvest fields of Africa. Raise dependable men and women — Goers, Givers, and Groaners — whom You can rely upon. Let Africa be saved, transformed, and discipled for Your glory through GOFAMINT.

entries.focus: Our General Overseer, Pastor E. O. Abina: For great revelation, uncommon leading, repositioning grace, and divine protection.
entries.inspirational_message: Every generation requires a man who walks closely with God, hears His heartbeat, and courageously leads God's people according to divine instruction. When God raises such a leader, He also raises intercessors to uphold his hands in prayer. Our Father in the Lord, Pastor (Dr.) Elijah Oludele Abina, has been a vessel of divine wisdom and unwavering faith for decades. In seasons like this, when God is repositioning His Church for greater glory, leaders need fresh revelation, deeper insight, and renewed grace. We remember when the Lord instructed our father concerning the move to Gospel City. At the time, logic, experience, and expert counsel all opposed it — yet our Daddy stood firmly on what God had spoken. Today, history testifies that obedience to divine leading never fails.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for the life of Your servant, Pastor (Dr.) E. O. Abina — for calling, anointing, and preserving him.
Lord, we thank You for the grace, wisdom, consistency, and faithfulness You have bestowed upon him.
Father, we are grateful for the great revelations and uncommon spiritual leading You have entrusted to him.
Lord, open unto Your servant new and higher realms of revelation in Your Word and in the Spirit.
Father, continue to speak to him clearly concerning Your agenda and purpose for the Church.
Let every word that proceeds from his mouth be filled with divine light, truth, and power.
Father, guide him continually by your Spirit to make decisions that produce revival, unity, and growth.
Release upon him fresh anointing for apostolic leadership, kingdom advancement, and generational impact.
Use him mightily as an instrument to usher the Church into new seasons of revival and reformation.
Surround him with men and women of faith, integrity, loyalty, and divine insight.
Father, renew his strength daily like the eagle, and let Your peace continually guard his heart and mind.
Let no weapon fashioned against him or his family prosper in any form.
Father, surround his home with angels of protection and Your abiding presence.
Let Your covenant of long life, sound health, divine safety, and preservation continue to rest upon him.
Preserve his mind, his vision, and his anointing — let none diminish or fade with time.
Lord, grant his family unity, peace, divine favor, and unending joy in Your presence.
Father, make his later years more glorious than the former.
By Your mercy, preserve his legacy of faith, obedience, and leadership for generations to come.
declarations: Our daddy GO is preserved.
His vision is sustained.
GOFAMINT advances in his time like never before.
God is glorified, always through him.
entries.special_intercession: Father, we pray that our General Overseer will never miss Your mark. He shall finish well and finish strong. No tears, sorrow, or regret shall accompany his later years. His path shall shine brighter and brighter unto the perfect day.

entries.focus: Power, boldness, and zeal to preach Jesus with signs and wonders; bringing souls into His Kingdom.
entries.scripture_text: Acts 1:8; Acts 4:29-33; Mark 16:17-20; Romans 1:16; 2 Timothy 1:6-7; 1 Corinthians 2:4
entries.inspirational_message: The greatest assignment entrusted to the Church is the Great Commission. This mandate cannot be fulfilled by human wisdom or eloquent speech alone. It requires divine power, holy boldness, and unquenchable zeal. Power is the evidence of God's presence. Boldness is the courage to proclaim Christ in hostile environments. Zeal is the spiritual fire that sustains passion for souls. Signs and wonders are God's confirmation upon the preached Word. The world is groaning, waiting for the manifestation of the sons of God. This is our moment. GOFAMINT must rise in power, boldness, and zeal, proclaiming Christ with signs following.
prayer_points: Father, I dedicate myself afresh as a vessel for Your glory and a faithful witness of Jesus.
Lord, purify my heart and cleanse my motives — let my passion for souls be genuine and Spirit-driven.
Father, deliver me from every spirit of fear, timidity, complacency, and silence.
Lord, empower me to speak Your Word with conviction, courage, and clarity.
Father, let my words carry divine authority that brings conviction and conversion to sinners.
O Lord, give me a tongue of fire that cannot be silenced, compromised, or intimidated.
Deliver me from spiritual lukewarmness and weariness; rekindle holy fire within me.
Father, make me restless until souls are saved, discipled, and established in Your Kingdom.
Lord, open my eyes to the harvest fields around me.
Father, make me a passionate ambassador of Christ — in speech, conduct, love, and compassion.
Fill me afresh with the power of the Holy Spirit and grant me unusual boldness to preach Christ.
Father, empower every pastor and minister in GOFAMINT with fresh fire, wisdom, and boldness.
Destroy every spirit of fear, discouragement, and exhaustion among our ministers.
Lord, empower us to demonstrate the Kingdom of God with supernatural evidence.
Let the same power that worked in the early apostles manifest mightily in our generation.
Father, use me as living proof that Jesus is alive — let miracles follow my obedience.
Let the fire of evangelism sweep through our churches, campuses, workplaces, and communities.
Lord, let every outreach, crusade, and evangelistic effort yield lasting fruits.
Father, grant divine strategies and creative wisdom to reach the unreached people groups.
Let Your Spirit of conviction rest upon our cities, leading multitudes to repentance and salvation.
Father, let my passion for the gospel never fade, regardless of challenges or opposition.
Lord, help me finish my course with joy and fulfill my divine calling as a soul-winner.
Through my obedience, let countless souls be added to Your Kingdom.
declarations: GOFAMINT as a church is empowered by the Holy Ghost.
All GOFAMINT members are bold witnesses for Christ.
The harvest is supernaturally gathered across the nations through GOFAMINT.
Christ is glorified in and through us in GOFAMINT.
entries.special_intercession: Father, make every member, worker, and minister in GOFAMINT a carrier of Your power in 2026. Let our assemblies become solution centers — places of healing, deliverance, salvation, and restoration. Confirm Your Word among us with signs following and let Your Kingdom advance mightily through us.

entries.focus: GOFAMINT in Europe, Asia, and Australia.
entries.inspirational_message: The Holy Spirit is in the business of gathering souls into the Kingdom in large numbers across continents, even as the rapture is imminent. Despite massive corruption and apostasy, God is using His own as agents of revival. We bless the Lord for the open doors He granted GOFAMINT to expand in Europe, Asia, and Australia. Members migrating to Europe have opened branches in their new locations. UK members are facing immigration challenges. The Anglican Church in the UK just named its first female and pro-LGBTQ Archbishop of Canterbury. But we are not ignorant of the enemy's devices.
prayer_points: Father, we thank you for our past evangelistic efforts in Europe, Asia, and Australia.
Father, we ask for a greater move of your Spirit to bring revival to these continents.
Father, we use GOFAMINT as a point of contact to pray for boldness in sharing the truth.
Father, let your mighty power be tangibly evident as our brethren share the gospel.
Father, open more doors for GOFAMINT in the United Kingdom, and cause GOFAMINT to spread there faster.
Father, intervene in the immigration situation of your children in the UK. Make a way for them to settle by godly means.
Father, awaken a deep hunger for your presence in GOFAMINT Belgium.
Holy Spirit, empower your children in Belgium with boldness and divine strategies to reach the lost.
Father, provide all that our churches in Belgium need to grow and fulfill their mission.
Father, strengthen the UAE church to withstand every odd. Give all ministers courage to spread the gospel boldly.
Father, we command the destruction of every gang up against your Kingdom in UAE.
Father, we ask for rapid kingdom expansion in the UAE through GOFAMINT — 2 more branches and extensions to Gulf and other Asian countries.
Father, we ask that your mercy will shield your people in Australia from all strange diseases and sudden death.
Father, we ask for the overrunning fire of revival that will spread from GOFAMINT Australia to all the Pacific nations.
Father, we pray for the multiplication of disciples in GOFAMINT Australia and an unstoppable move of your power.

entries.focus: Removing barriers to unstoppable church growth in GOFAMINT.
entries.inspirational_message: The Church of Jesus Christ is divinely ordained for unstoppable growth, influence, and impact. Yet, in many seasons, unseen barriers arise that slow the pace of God's agenda. These hindrances may be spiritual, organizational, relational, or rooted in internal attitudes. Some obstacles are 'hidden yet obvious' — we feel their effects but often ignore their sources. God does not bless what He has not purified. Before increase comes cleansing; before expansion comes alignment. Common barriers include lukewarmness, prayerlessness, carnality, division, strife, mediocrity, leadership failure, societal distractions, and cultural resistance. This is the season for unstoppable increase — nothing shall hinder God's mission!
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for establishing this Mission and making us part of Your end-time Church.
Lord, we thank You for every soul saved, every life transformed, and every testimony of Your grace.
Father, we appreciate You for the leaders, workers, and members You have used to build this Mission.
O Lord, forgive us in every way we may have contributed to the slow growth of Your Church.
Father, expose and uproot every hidden but obvious obstacle hindering the growth of this Mission.
Lord, silence every voice of division, strife, disunity, and confusion within our Mission.
Father, let the fire of revival sweep through every assembly under this Mission.
O Lord, grant our leaders wisdom, boldness, and divine direction for sustainable growth.
Father, frustrate every satanic plan designed to resist the advancement of this Church.
Lord, we rededicate this Mission afresh to You — take over every department, decision, and direction.
Expose every spiritual, moral, administrative, and relational hindrance slowing down Your work.
Father, reveal and dismantle every unseen hand or force secretly working against the expansion of this Mission.
Lord, shine Your light into every area of darkness and bring every secret hindrance into the open.
Father, grant our leaders divine insight to deal decisively with invisible barriers.
We uproot every seed of division, rebellion, and discord sown by the enemy among us.
We nullify every curse or negative word spoken against this Mission by the blood of Jesus.
Father, remove every attitude of pride, competition, and self-centeredness from leadership and membership.
Lord, heal every broken relationship, mistrust, and internal conflict weakening our unity.
Father, renew in us a heart of obedience, humility, submission, and love for Your Word.
Lord, provide the financial, material, and human resources required to fulfill this Mission's vision.
Father, help us build godly systems and structures that support expansion, not stagnation.
Deliver us from mismanagement, corruption, and unfaithfulness in stewardship.
Father, let every project, program, and outreach receive divine speed and supernatural completion.
Father, confirm Your Word among us with signs, wonders, and undeniable testimonies.
Father, let the wind of the Holy Spirit blow mightily, drawing multitudes into Your Kingdom.
Lord, let every branch, department, and ministry experience supernatural growth and fruitfulness.
Father, raise laborers, intercessors, and financial partners for every field of our assignment.
Lord, fill this Mission with Your glory like never before, that nations may come to the brightness of our rising.
declarations: The barriers to GOFAMINT growth are removed.
Our gates are opened continually for unstoppable increase.
Our season of supernatural harvest is here.
GOFAMINT advances in grace and glory, like never before.
entries.special_intercession: Father, remove every imaginary and real boundary that is limiting this Mission. Dismantle every barricade standing against limitless growth and expansion. Let Your Church advance unhindered, unstoppable, and victorious.

entries.focus: GOFAMINT in North and South America.
entries.inspirational_message: The Gospel Faith Mission International is fully committed to fulfilling the Great Commission. GOFAMINT North America launched the 'Elijah Abina Soul Winners Competition' aligned with Operation 2030. Progress continues on the Gospel City and the GOFAMINT NA Seminary & School of Ministry under Pastor Tosin Oladapo. Through the Foreign Missions Department under Pastor Sunday Adu, GOFAMINT was successfully registered in Brazil. Many souls shall be won for Christ in the South American continent as we cast the net using Brazil as our launching pad. Prayer is needed for brethren affected by economic and immigration policies leading to job losses and deportation.
prayer_points: Father, we thank you for your goodness and faithfulness to GOFAMINT in North America since its establishment over 40 years ago.
Father, bless the visions and initiatives of GOFAMINT North America with amazing results this year.
Father, supply all human, material and spiritual resources needed for the operations of the church this year.
Father, use the Elijah Abina soul winner's initiative for the purpose of massive souls' harvest.
Father, help GOFAMINT to be fully established in South America, and grant us full operational capacity in Brazil this year.
Father, cause every assembly of GOFAMINT in North and South America to be a solution center.
Father, we ask that all our churches in North and South America be populated by indigenes as we preach the gospel.
Father, let your mighty hand rest on the Chosen Generation and Next Generation ministries in North America.
Father, please help the National Overseer of GOFAMINT, North America, Pastor Taiwo Fagbuyi, and his team. Let your grace be multiplied.
Father, use the GOFAMINTNA Seminary to raise apostolic leaders for your work in North America.
We receive more than sufficient resources to build the Gospel City without stress or struggle.
Father, please come through for our members dealing with challenges regarding finances, academics, jobs, and immigration status.
Father, we ask that you uphold and sustain GOFAMINT, Mexico. Bless them with committed members.
Father, establish GOFAMINT solidly in Jamaica as we look up to you to launch them on the wings of grace.
Father, we ask for men and women that will sponsor, support, and stabilize the work of GOFAMINT Canada.
Father, give us laborers with deep passion for lost souls in Canada.
Father, raise workers committed to building your kingdom, and grant us your ordained allocation of our own building location.

entries.focus: GOFAMINT youth & students, contact true revival and attract great exploits to change your world and transform your church.
entries.scripture_text: Isaiah 57:15; 2 Chronicles 7:14; Isaiah 40:31; Romans 12:2; Joel 2:28-29; Psalm 51:10
entries.inspirational_message: In an age defined by speed, noise, and endless distractions, the Church is increasingly confronted with spiritual boredom and lukewarm faith. Many youths and students have drifted from their first love, replacing genuine devotion with religious routines and entertainment-driven worship. The distinct moral identity of Christian youths is under intense pressure. What the Church urgently needs is not more entertainment but a fresh encounter with the holiness, presence, and power of God. True revival produces genuine repentance, renewed passion for prayer, fresh hunger for God's Word, burden for lost souls, and Christlike character. When youths are intentionally discipled, they strengthen the Church from within and become torchbearers for the future.
prayer_points: Lord, open the eyes of our youths and students to their true spiritual condition and create in them a desperate hunger for You.
Father, on behalf of our youths and students, we confess their sins corporately and plead for genuine brokenness and repentance.
Create in them clean hearts, O God, and renew right spirits within them.
Father, ignite in our youths and students a deep hunger for Your Word and pour out Your Spirit upon them afresh.
Lord, purify their hearts from worldly influences, addictions, and hopelessness, and grant them courage to live sanctified lives.
Replace lukewarmness with passionate love for God in the lives of our youths and students.
Father, release a mighty outpouring of the Holy Spirit upon them — empowering them to live and preach the gospel boldly.
Make our youths and students committed, relevant, and available for mentorship as future godly leaders in GOFAMINT.
Father, make them truly the light of the world in their schools, workplaces, and communities.
Strengthen all Youth, GSF, and NYSC leaders to preach the Word with boldness, conviction, and power.
Use our youths and students for a mighty harvest of souls, shaking nations with the power of the gospel.
Let the transformed lives of our youths and students reveal the reality of God and bring glory to the Father.
Grant them grace to endure, walk in newness of life, and preserve the fruits of revival for generations to come.
entries.special_intercession: Father, let the long-awaited impact of our youths and students begin to manifest across all our assemblies and institutions. Awaken a revived generation that loves holiness, burns for souls, and lives for Your glory.

entries.focus: Lord, raise heaven-minded, God-honoring, dependable and consistent financiers in GOFAMINT for our projects and programs.
entries.inspirational_message: God is the ultimate Source of all wealth; men are merely channels through whom His resources flow. When God blesses a person, it is never for personal comfort alone, but for Kingdom purpose. Heaven-minded believers understand that wealth is a trust, not a trophy. The advancement of the Church is accelerated when God raises dependable men and women of substance — faithful stewards who can be trusted to fund His vision without murmuring or compromise. The prayer of Jabez teaches us to ask boldly. 'Enlarge my territory' was not driven by greed, but by a desire for greater impact. Your coast is your sphere of influence and increase.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You as the Source of all wealth and resources; we acknowledge You as our Provider.
Lord, raise heaven-minded, covenant-keeping financiers who will honor You in all their ways within our Mission.
Father, fill every heart in GOFAMINT with the spirit of generosity and faithful stewardship.
Bless the work of our members' hands and make them channels of divine supply.
Uproot every spirit of selfishness, greed, and financial unfaithfulness from our midst.
Empower us to give joyfully, consistently, and sacrificially for Kingdom advancement.
O Lord, raise dependable men and women who will finance Your projects without wavering.
Father, give me a committed heart of giving and obedience.
Release divine ideas, businesses, strategies, and opportunities that will fund GOFAMINT's vision.
Lord, enlarge our coasts and open our lives to supernatural increase.
Let the dew of Your blessings rest upon every seed sown, producing abundant harvests.
Spirit of the Living God, arise and position me in my place of blessing now.
O God of abundance, let Your blessing spring forth in every area of my life.
Turn the work of my hands into channels of blessing to me and to others.
Grant me the grace of the sons of Issachar — to know what to do and when to do it.
Let my hands become instruments of divine prosperity, and my eyes and ears instruments of revelation.
Every power resisting my lifting and advancement — scatter by fire.
Protect and preserve every Kingdom financier from loss, sickness, distraction, and burnout.
Father, let every GOFAMINT project and program receive timely, supernatural provision and completion.
Let our giving bring honor to Your name and expansion to Your Kingdom.
Make GOFAMINT a testimony of divine abundance and faithful stewardship in our generation.
Father, continually bless the work of our members' hands and keep us fruitful.
Raise more dependable financiers to stand for Your work without wavering.
Release sustained provision through righteous enterprises to fund the Mission's vision.
Let overflow become our portion — spiritually, materially, and financially.
Lord, establish GOFAMINT as a model of Kingdom financing and godly stewardship.
entries.special_intercession: Father, raise dependable financiers for GOFAMINT. Trust us with resources for Your vision. Let me be counted among those You will use to fund Your work faithfully and joyfully.

entries.focus: Executive Council members: sharing the mind and zeal for soul-winning of our General Overseer.
entries.inspirational_message: The Gospel Faith Mission International stands today as a spiritual force in Nigeria and beyond. The reason for this success is rooted in vision, obedience, and relentless commitment to soul-winning. Two pillars stand immovable: founding GO late Pastor (Dr.) R. A. George, and present GO Pastor (Dr.) Elijah Oludele Abina. In 1979, Pastor George ordered a six-month crash training for fifty Seminary students and released them into the harvest field — that bold obedience ignited a movement. Pastor Abina launched Operation Open Door, doubling branches in five years; then Operation Identification mobilizing every member. Today the heartbeat of the GO is unchanged: winning souls and reaching the unreached. If the Executive Council fully catches this fire, the entire church will burn with it.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for the power of the gospel through which You saved our souls and established GOFAMINT.
Thank You, Lord, for the vision You gave to our founding fathers — a vision still bearing fruit.
We bless Your name for our heroes of faith, late Pastor (Dr.) R. A. George and Pastor (Dr.) E. O. Abina.
Thank You for all founding fathers and mothers, and former Executive Council members — reward them eternally.
Father, we thank You for choosing every member of the present Executive Council, both permanent and rotational.
Today, we present every GOFAMINT Executive Council member before You — lay Your hand upon them.
Grant each of them deep intimacy with You and sustained fellowship with the Holy Spirit.
Take of the spirit upon Your servant, the General Overseer, and release it upon every EXCO member.
Renew and deepen the vision for soul-winning in the hearts of all Executive Council members.
Let the anointing for evangelism flow powerfully from the General Overseer through the EXCO to all GOFAMINT ministers.
Open the eyes and ears of our leaders to know where, when, and how to win souls for You.
Make soul-winning a serious, lifelong assignment for every EXCO member.
In all their meetings and deliberations, help them give soul-winning the highest priority.
Grant them fresh unction to function and lead GOFAMINT into the next and best level of kingdom impact.
Use the present Executive Council to write another chapter of outstanding success in GOFAMINT's evangelistic history.
Establish strong spiritual alignment and healthy connection between the EXCO and the General Overseer.
Bless the lives and families of every Executive Council member with blessings money can buy and cannot buy.
Protect them from every danger, evil plot, and spiritual attack.
entries.special_intercession: Father, keep the GOFAMINT Executive Council permanently on the firing line of soul winning. Let the heartbeat of the General Overseer — evangelism and harvest of souls — remain the heartbeat of the EXCO and the entire Mission. May GOFAMINT never lose its evangelistic fire.

entries.focus: Honoring and sustaining our retired fathers and mothers.
entries.inspirational_message: Today's Bible reading presents a timeless truth: there is a season for everything under heaven. The fathers and mothers we are lifting today were once vibrant young men and women, full of strength and dreams. In the wisdom of God's timing, they have entered a quieter season operating more in the background. While the gift of longevity is a blessing, the limitations of aging remind us of the fragility of life. Many of our retirees lived purposeful lives — serving God, nurturing families, building the Church, impacting communities. Now they need divine sustainability, comfort, honor, and support. Scripture assures us: 'My grace is sufficient for thee.' That grace will sustain them to the very end.
prayer_points: Father, we thank You for the lives of our fathers and mothers — the retirees — whom You have graciously preserved.
Thank You for the many years of service they rendered to their families, the Church, and the community.
Thank You, Lord, for the hand You played in shaping their lives and destinies.
Dear Lord, in this season of their lives, draw them closer to You and surround them with Your abiding presence.
Father, where strength has diminished, arise as their help and provider in every area of need.
Raise helpers for them and bless their children with the capacity and willingness to care for their parents honorably.
Put the spirit of honor, love, and responsibility toward parents in the hearts of all the children of our retirees.
Touch the hearts of brethren in the Church to be compassionate and responsive to the needs of our retirees.
Let help arise for them — from known and unknown sources, expected and unexpected channels.
Holy Spirit, fill their hearts with joy, peace, and contentment; let sadness and loneliness be far from them.
Open doors of reward for them — let them reap the harvest of their labor of love in Your Kingdom.
Meet their specific and general needs according to Your riches in glory.
Surround them with favor — from their children, neighbors, the Church, and the wider community.
