Grant them divine health and strength; let their remaining days not be marked by pain or distress.
Help them maintain a strong, vibrant relationship with You, walking in faith and hope to the end.
Let none of them regret the years they lived or served You; instead, fill them with gratitude and fulfillment.
Cause the government, society, the Church, and their families to deal kindly and generously with them.
Surprise and satisfy them with good things in these latter days of their lives.
Father, help them finish strong and finish well, enjoying Your love on earth and eternal fellowship in heaven.
entries.special_intercession: Father, raise covenant helpers for all our retirees. Be their shield, comforter, and protector. Sustain them by Your grace until it pleases You to call them home in peace and glory.

entries.focus: Great grace and divine support for the families of our founding General Overseer and other past heroes.
entries.inspirational_message: GOFAMINT is deeply favored by God for giving us faithful founding leaders — vessels of honor who poured out their lives. Through their obedience, sacrifice, and unwavering commitment, countless lives have been transformed. Many GOFAMINT members today never personally met our late founding fathers, yet all of us are beneficiaries of their labor. Truly, 'though they are dead, they still speak.' GOFAMINT stands today as a fruitful vineyard — a place of salvation, healing, restoration, promotion, and divine encounters. This is the product of genuine calling, transparent lifestyles, and absolute devotion to God by our founding General Overseer and his co-laborers. One of the noblest ways to honor our late fathers is to pray intentionally for their families.
prayer_points: Blessed be the God of Pastor Reuben Akinwalere George, who saved him, called him, anointed him, and used him as a blessing.
Father, we thank You for the great vision You gave him — a vision that continues to transform lives across generations.
We pray that the descendants of Pastor R. A. George will be mighty upon the earth.
Lord, visit every branch of the R. A. George family lineage and establish them in greatness and honor.
Let abundance of spiritual and natural resources rest upon them without measure.
Help every member of that family to discover, connect with, and fulfill their God-ordained destinies.
Let not the lot of the wicked come upon any member of that blessed family.
Every mountain of challenge confronting any of them — be brought low and reduced to nothing.
Standing in God's presence on behalf of all our fathers and mothers in the faith who have gone to glory, we declare divine blessings upon all their families.
We decree the goodness of God upon every family of those who labored faithfully with Pastor R. A. George.
Father, release abundance of blessings upon the families of all who have served in the Executive Council of GOFAMINT.
Every battle confronting any member of the families of our heroes of faith — scatter and collapse by the power of God.
Let the children of our leaders reap the good fruits of their parents' labor in the Lord.
Arise, O God, and meet the specific needs of each member of these families.
Make them shining examples of faith and living reflections of Your glory.
entries.special_intercession: Father, let our founding General Overseer and all past heroes of faith never lack biological and spiritual children to carry on their divine mandate and vision. Preserve their legacy, multiply their seed, and let their impact continue from generation to generation.

entries.focus: Nigeria shall rise again: a call to national repentance and divine intervention.
entries.inspirational_message: Nigeria, our beloved nation, is richly endowed by God — blessed with abundant natural resources and gifted with resilient, intelligent people. Yet, paradoxically, a land of abundance groans under scarcity. There is food in plenty, yet hunger persists. There is wealth in the soil, yet many live in poverty. These contradictions remind us that human solutions alone cannot heal Nigeria. Like Nehemiah, when he heard of the broken walls of Jerusalem, we must rise to pray. National restoration begins not in political maneuvering but in humble repentance and earnest prayer. Our nation needs divine intervention — leaders sent by God, hearts transformed by righteousness, and a people aligned with God's will.
prayer_points: O God, Creator of Nigeria, we thank You for Your mercy that has preserved our nation.
Thank You, Lord, for the rich endowments You have given Nigeria — both human and material resources.
Father, we confess that we have sinned as a nation; forgive us our shortcomings and rebellion.
By the blood of Jesus, purge Nigeria from every sin, iniquity, and corruption.
O Lord, heal our land — heal our institutions, our communities, and our hearts.
We take authority in Christ and dismantle every power, principality, and stronghold controlling Nigeria.
Father, grant our leaders a change of heart — let them govern with wisdom, justice, compassion, and fear of God.
Lord, help us as citizens to be law-abiding, responsible, and committed to righteousness.
Turn our captivity, O Lord — restore our joy, prosperity, and dignity.
Deliver Nigeria from all forms of oppression — political, economic, social, and spiritual.
Nigeria, arise and shine! For your light has come, and the glory of the Lord has risen upon you.
We declare: Nigeria, you are blessed of the Lord.
Nigeria, you are great — remain great by God's grace.
Let the light of the gospel shine brighter and brighter across every region of Nigeria.
We declare by faith: we shall eat the good of this land.
Father, revive Nigeria's economy — restore strength to our currency and stability to our markets.
Let Nigerians in the diaspora return home with skills, resources, and vision for national development.
Lord, arise in Your power and put an end to insecurity, violence, and fear.
Disgrace every adversary of the gospel; draw multitudes to Your saving power.
Father, let there be a Jesus Revolution across Nigeria — from the North to the South, East to West.
declarations: Nigeria is redeemed.
Nigeria is restored.
Nigeria shall fulfill her destiny.
God bless Nigeria.
entries.special_intercession: Father, put an end to genocide, bloodshed, and the destruction of lives and property in Nigeria. Let righteousness, peace, and justice prevail. Ignite a nationwide Jesus Revolution that transforms hearts, reforms systems, and restores hope.

entries.focus: Enjoying the season of great revival and great exploits.
entries.inspirational_message: Life is governed by divine contrasts — light and darkness, night and morning, sowing and reaping. While evil characterizes the last days, the same last days will witness an unprecedented outpouring of the Holy Spirit. God has appointed seasons of joy, restoration, and celebration. Throughout this season of fasting and prayer, we have prayed against the works of darkness. Now we must believe and receive that the night has passed and the morning has come: 'Weeping may endure for a night, but joy comes in the morning.' Some have lived so long with adversity they struggle to believe in turnaround. But God has visited us. We are not victims; we are God's covenant people. After thirty days of fasting and prayer, the season of celebration has come.
prayer_points: I have every reason to praise the Lord — He has done great things for me.
Father, thank You for the genuine spirit of revival You have released upon our lives and our church.
Thank You for the transformational encounters that have become our portion.
Thank You for the manifestation of Your glory in unprecedented ways in our lives.
Thank You, Lord, for taking Your rightful place in our lives and in GOFAMINT.
We bless You because the power of the flesh and the forces of darkness no longer hold us captive.
Every obstacle has turned into a miracle — thank You, Lord.
We declare forward movement spiritually, ministerially, and financially.
No weapon fashioned against us shall prosper anymore.
We receive divine connections and alignments for effective functioning and fruitfulness.
Surely goodness and mercy shall follow us continually.
We declare: 'We wax great, we go forward, and we grow until we become very great.'
Let everyone rejoice and praise the Lord — let joy overflow in our midst.
declarations: The night is over.
The morning has come.
Our joy is permanent.
God is glorified, forever in and through us in GOFAMINT worldwide. Hallelujah!!!
entries.special_intercession: Father, by Your mercy, let this new season usher in a continual time of refreshing throughout 2026. Sustain the victories You have given us throughout this year and beyond. Let joy, peace, progress, and divine increase abound in our lives and in GOFAMINT as a whole.

entries.focus: Victory over family challenges and household battles.
entries.inspirational_message: Every family, no matter how strong, loving, or godly, faces challenges and battles within the home. Some are natural — financial stress, communication breakdown, parenting struggles, health issues — while others are deeply spiritual: household enemies, generational curses, addictions, and ungodly influences. God never designed the family to be a battlefield of defeat but a sanctuary of love, peace, and His abiding presence. The question is not whether challenges will come — they surely will — but whether we will face them in our own strength or in the strength of the Lord. Victory is possible when families build on Christ the Rock, embrace biblical principles, and stand together in prayer, unity, and love.
prayer_points: Father, I thank You because my family is ordained for blessing and not for defeat.
Every power assigned to sow division and strife in my household, be scattered in the name of Jesus.
Lord, supply all the financial needs of my family according to Your riches in glory.
We reject sickness, untimely death, and affliction in our household; let health and peace reign.
Every root of misunderstanding, bitterness, and poor communication in my family, be uprooted.
Father, release wisdom and grace upon us to raise godly children that will bring You glory.
By the blood of Jesus, I break every generational curse and household bondage working against my family.
O Lord, deliver my family from the manipulation of household enemies and unfriendly friends.
Father, restore love, unity, and joy in every marriage and home under attack.
Lord, build a hedge of protection around my household against the arrows of the wicked.
We declare that as for us and our household, we shall serve the Lord all the days of our lives.
Father, let our home become a testimony of victory, peace, and fruitfulness to the glory of Your name.
discussion_questions: What are some common family challenges we face today, and how do they compare with challenges faced by biblical families?
How can financial stress affect love, unity, and spirituality in the home?
What practical steps can couples take to improve communication and reduce strife in marriage?
In what ways do household enemies (Micah 7:6) manifest in today's families, and how should believers respond?
How does the absence of a family altar (prayer, devotion, worship) open the door to household battles?
What role do forgiveness and love play in securing victory over both natural challenges and spiritual battles?
How can we, as Christian families, build resilience to withstand external pressures such as negative media, ungodly culture, and peer influence?

entries.focus: Revive us again, O Lord, and make us a blessing to our generation.
entries.inspirational_message: The cry for revival is not new. The Psalmist prayed: 'Wilt thou not revive us again: that thy people may rejoice in thee?' Revival is God breathing life into dry bones, rekindling dying fires, and raising His people to walk in His power. But revival is never for personal satisfaction alone — it is so that we might become blessings to others. Abraham was called, blessed, then commissioned: 'I will bless thee… and thou shalt be a blessing.' Our prayer is not only 'Lord, revive me,' but also 'Lord, make me an agent of revival to my generation.' True revival begins with one person, restores broken altars, heals relationships, renews our love for God, brings divine visitation, and equips us to serve as agents of revival.
prayer_points: Lord, revive my heart and set me aflame for Your glory.
Father, let revival begin in me and overflow to my family.
O Lord, restore every broken prayer altar in my life and home.
Heal all broken relationships in my family, church, and community.
Rekindle my first love for You, O Lord, and renew my hunger for Your Word.
Let there be a fresh outpouring of Your Spirit upon me and my generation.
Father, visit me with divine encounters that will transform my destiny.
Make me and my family channels of blessing to our generation.
Empower me to become an agent of revival in my church and community.
Lord, let this year be marked with undeniable revival and mighty testimonies.
discussion_questions: What does revival mean to you personally?
Why must revival start from the home?
How can we practically rebuild broken prayer altars?
What role does forgiveness play in revival?
What are the signs of losing our first love for God?
How can we prepare for divine visitation in our time?
In what ways can a revived believer be a blessing to his/her community?

entries.focus: My family, arise, shine and do great exploits.
entries.inspirational_message: Every family is ordained by God to be a light in a dark world, a city set on a hill that cannot be hidden. God's design is that our homes be centers of His glory, power, and influence. To arise means to break free from limitation, stagnation, or bondage. To shine means to reflect the glory of God in every aspect of life. Families that know their God will not only survive but do great exploits for His kingdom. A shining family experiences deliverance from darkness, open heavens, manifestation of God's glory, and grace to serve, excel, prosper, and become Kingdom builders. To do great exploits means to achieve extraordinary things for God's kingdom through His strength.
prayer_points: Father, thank You for making my family a carrier of Your light and glory.
By the blood of Jesus, I decree total deliverance of my family from every power of darkness.
O Lord, let every closed heaven over my family be opened now.
Father, let Your glory overshadow my family and make us a testimony.
Lord, release fresh grace upon us to serve You faithfully and fruitfully.
Father, empower every member of my family to excel in life and destiny.
Lord, let our family prosper in health, wisdom, and resources.
Father, make our home a center of revival and kingdom expansion.
Lord, break every generational curse and establish generational blessings in my lineage.
Father, let our family altar carry fresh fire for prayer and worship.
O Lord, use our family to raise godly children and impact our community.
Father, let our family arise, shine, and do great exploits for Your kingdom.
discussion_questions: What does it mean for a family to arise and shine in today's world?
What are some common forms of darkness families need deliverance from?
How can a family practically walk under open heavens?
In what ways can God's glory be seen in a Christian home?
What role does grace play in excelling in life and destiny?
How can families balance prosperity with kingdom building?
What practical steps can our family take to become a blessing to others?

entries.focus: Liberating your future from the cankerworm of present-day godless lifestyle, waywardness and pollution; fulfilling your destiny.
entries.scripture_text: Proverbs 14:12; Isaiah 53:6; James 1:27; 2 Corinthians 6:17; Titus 2:11-12; Daniel 11:32
entries.inspirational_message: Every person has a glorious, God-given destiny. As Christians, we are called to live a 'mountain top destiny.' However, sin and spiritual pollution act as 'cankerworms' or devourers that hinder destiny fulfillment. Joseph fled temptation and preserved his destiny. Daniel refused to defile himself and ended in promotion. Today's godless lifestyle, waywardness, and pollution include lust, peer pressure, materialism, lack of discipline, moral compromise, pride, and false teachings. The pathway to liberate your future requires being born again, repentance, fleeing sin, guarding your heart, commitment to Bible study, walking in the Spirit, embracing discipline and excellence, engaging in spiritual warfare, and being accountable through godly relationships.
prayer_points: Every power assigned to frustrate my destiny, be frustrated; powers assigned to silence my glory, scatter by fire.
Father, anytime I want to make a mistake, direct me aright; anoint my eyes, hands, and legs to locate my divine purpose.
My Father, I refuse to be stagnant in life; re-arrange my destiny according to your divine purpose.
Father, restore me to your original design and purpose for my life — let my destiny arise and shine.
Father, connect me with wise friends and mentors who will support me in fulfilling my destiny.
Holy Ghost fire, purge my spirit, soul, and body of every pollution; let the Blood of Jesus flush out every contamination.
By the authority of the Name of Jesus, I paralyze every destiny polluter assigned against my life.
Every satanic cage or chain holding me captive in waywardness and stagnation, break by fire.
Lord, reveal to me the cankerworms in my life and grant me the strength to overcome them.
Every curse of stagnation and waywardness operating against my destiny, break by fire.
Father, give me a miracle that will make me forget my past sufferings, and restore all the years I have lost.
I receive the grace to flee youthful passions and pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace.
Father, empower me with discernment, and the hunger for your knowledge, to walk in your perfect will.
Father, grant me the grace to live a holy life in this perverse world and be an agent of transformation.
Father, help me to remember my Creator in the days of my youth and pursue godliness with all my heart.
Father, restore every wasted year and lost opportunity, and place me back on your divine schedule for my destiny.
discussion_questions: How does a lack of knowledge about our divine destiny make us more susceptible to waywardness and pollution?
How do you reconcile personal dreams and ambitions with God's plan for your life?
What steps can you take to move toward your God-given purpose?
Why is it important to start early in seeking God and His purpose?
Discuss the role of discipline and integrity in the process of destiny fulfillment.
In what ways can peer pressure or modern media contribute to spiritual pollution?
What practical steps can we take this year to guard our minds and spirits from worldly pollutions?

entries.focus: Uprooting Satanic activities from our church and homes.
entries.inspirational_message: Tares are always found among the wheat in the church of God. The wheat are true children of the kingdom; the tares are agents of Satan. A mixed multitude joined the children of Israel on their wilderness journey and were responsible for most of the rebellion. Allowing Satanic agents to thrive in the church will never bring glory to God — they must be uprooted. While we don't put any punitive action against any human being, we must use our spiritual weapons to deal with evil spirits by casting them out. The Bible never told us to spare demons; instead, we are commanded to cast them out. These Satanic agents are destructive — lack of growth, lack of progress, and disasters witnessed in the church are often their handiwork.
prayer_points: Thank you, Lord, for shedding your blood for the sanctification of the church.
Help every one of us in the church to sanctify ourselves and separate our lives from all unclean things.
Help all our ministers to continue to deliver the true message of the word for liberation from the entanglement of sin.
Grant our ministers both the discerning of spirit and the word of knowledge to rid the church of strange elements.
Grant every one of us in the church the genuine heart of repentance and faithfulness to God.
Holy Spirit, please move in the length and breadth of our church to help all our members forsake all hidden works of dishonesty.
Dear Lord, strengthen brethren who are being falsely accused of demon involvements, that they remain steadfast.
Dear Father, let there be light in our church and let all manifestations of darkness disappear.
We stand against all Satanic agents and instruments in our church, and we declare them null and void.
We release the fire of God all over our church for total destruction of all the works of Satan.
Let there be revival fire to consume all evil works over our churches.
Dear Holy Spirit, convict every sinner and let there be mass repentance leading to confession and forsaking of sin.
For the hard-hearted ones, let the judgment begin in this house of God.
Whatever trouble has been imported into the church and inflicted upon any member by Satanic agents, let there be total deliverance and relief.
discussion_questions: How did Peter discover that Ananias and Sapphira were insincere?
What is the advantage of the word of knowledge and word of wisdom in the ministry of our ministers?
What is the difference between manifestation of the gifts of the Spirit and levelling allegations against people on suspicion?
Suggest other ways by which we can prevent Satanic activities in the church.

entries.focus: Fortifying our homes and churches against all forms of worldly and satanic allurements, attractions, and distractions; promoting true revival.
entries.inspirational_message: In these perilous times, the walls of holiness around many homes and churches have been broken down by worldly pleasures, distractions, and compromises. The devil no longer fights with open persecution; he seduces through attraction. But God is raising a remnant that will fortify their homes and sanctuaries with prayer, purity, and power. Like Nehemiah, we must rebuild the broken walls of faith. Revival begins not in the crowd, but in the closet of prayer in our homes — where parents lead altars of devotion, and in churches that exalt Christ above comfort. The Church must once again become the voice of truth and the home, the foundation of holiness.
prayer_points: Lord, as Men and heads of homes, we surrender our homes and churches; be the foundation and fortress of our lives.
Father, thank You for preserving our lives, homes, and churches despite the corruption of this present age.
Lord, forgive us for every compromise that opened the door to worldliness.
Father, deliver us from every worldly pattern and mindset infiltrating our homes and Churches.
Lord, purge our hearts from the love of worldly pleasures and material distractions.
Father, rebuild the broken spiritual walls around our homes and churches.
Lord, separate us from ungodly influences that defile our spirits.
O Lord, restore the altar of prayer and devotion in every GOFAMINT home.
Let every strange fire on the altar of the Church or in our homes be quenched by the fire of the Holy Ghost.
Expose and destroy every satanic agenda hidden in worldly entertainment.
Every false teaching and deceptive voice, be silenced in Jesus' name!
Let holiness return to the Gofamint pulpit, the choir, and the congregation.
Sanctify GOFAMINT youths and deliver them from the grip of immoral influence.
Lord, fortify GOFAMINT marriages and families against satanic attacks.
Father, ignite fresh fire that will consume spiritual coldness in GOFAMINT.
Every agent of distraction in the Church, be exposed and removed.
Holy Spirit, move mightily across our homes, cities, and nations with revival fire.
Father, let Your glory fill GOFAMINT again as in the days of old.
Help us to resist every satanic attraction and draw closer to You in obedience.
Give us the courage to live in holiness and separation from every form of compromise.
Clothe every family and church in GOFAMINT with divine armor against satanic deception.
Lord, let every home become an altar of worship and truth, not of carnality.
Guard our eyes, hearts, and minds from the seductive content of the world.
Rekindle the spirit of unity, prayer, and teaching that fueled the early church's revival.
Father, send a fresh wave of true revival that purifies hearts and restores zeal for Your Kingdom.
Lord, let Your grace empower us to live soberly, righteously, and godly in this present world.
Lord, consume every impurity and distraction in our homes and churches; let Your Holy Ghost fire burn again.
discussion_questions: How does lack of love and unity between husband and wife create broken walls in the family? Who should initiate love?
How does lack of family devotion affect the family? Whose responsibility is it to be the priest in the house?
How does lack of provision and protection for the family affect the church and society?
What other factors must we take heed of to fortify our homes for the advancement of God's Kingdom?

entries.focus: Dealing with obvious and hidden obstacles hindering us from securing great revival, strategic positioning, and all-round church growth.
entries.inspirational_message: Every move of God faces resistance — both seen and unseen. Revival does not fail because God is unwilling, but because obstacles remain unbroken. Some barriers are visible — fear, disunity, complacency, sin, and prayerlessness. Others are hidden — pride, unbelief, wrong motives, or lack of discernment. God reveals obstacles so we can confront them through repentance and prayer. Until we clear the hindrances, the rain of revival cannot fully fall. Strategic positioning comes when God can trust us to carry His glory. Church growth is not just numerical but spiritual, rooted in truth and holiness. When the hindrances go, the heavens open, and the harvest flows in. This is the time to break barriers and usher in a new wave of God's power!
prayer_points: Lord, search us deeply and expose every hidden flaw or attitude that hinders revival in our lives and churches.
Father, purge every vessel You intend to use for revival; make us ready and available instruments of transformation.
Lord, replace our stony hearts with hearts of flesh — tender, teachable, and obedient to Your Spirit.
Help Your Church return to sincere repentance, fasting, and brokenness that births genuine revival.
Deliver us from unbelief and spiritual complacency that limit Your move among us.
Stir up a fresh spirit of intercession and sacrifice that breaks strongholds in our mission.
Lord, let the fire of the Holy Ghost rest upon our leaders, workers, and members for end-time revival.
Give every member of GOFAMINT a united heart and renewed zeal to build and advance the Kingdom.
Father, breathe life into every weak department, cold altar, and dry congregation; send revival again!
Go before GOFAMINT, Lord, and remove every crooked system, hidden agenda, or unseen resistance.
O Lord, let Your Heavenly Carpenters defray all the scattering horns against our greatness and strategic growth.
Cause Your Word to spread unhindered; let numerical and spiritual growth follow in every assembly.
Grant us divine re-positioning for strategic take-over of significant mountains for You.
We thank You for past victories; now, Lord, take us into higher grounds of impact and relevance.
Purge our leaders and workers from worldliness, pride, and compromise, and make us vessels unto honor.
Let GOFAMINT arise in revival glory; make us light to the nations and cities around us.
Every spiritual gate blocking revival, strategic influence, or growth — be lifted in the name of Jesus!
Lord, give our leaders wisdom and divine direction for strategic positioning in these last days.
Let Jesus be exalted above all in our messages, programs, and lifestyles — draw souls to Yourself.
Turn every limitation into celebration; let testimonies of revival and growth fill our churches.
Lord, arise and show mercy upon Your church; it is time for revival favor — let it manifest!
Father, let the fire of revival spread beyond our assemblies — across cities, nations, and continents!
discussion_questions: What are the mountains, challenges and obstacles that confront us today as believers and as members of GOFAMINT in securing strategic positioning?
What is the 'big picture' that God has on the issue of our strategic positioning according to Zechariah 1:17?

Discuss the importance of possessing the seven mountains of influence (Religion, Family, Education, Science/Technology, Commerce/Industry, Politics/Government, Arts/Entertainment) and submitting them to God.
How can we download the seven realms obtained for us by our Lord Jesus Christ in Revelation 5:12 by His seven-fold Spirit operation in Isaiah 11:2?
